chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-272 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 1253/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 1254/25 4.For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Mr. Sadam Hussain Abro, Advocate for petitioner. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioner will file fresh petition. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
